title: Login issue
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still face the same issue.

title: Payment failed
description: Customer reports that the payment fails during checkout. They attempted multiple cards but the transaction does not complete.

title: UI alignment issue
description: Customer noticed that buttons overlap on the mobile screen, making it difficult to click the correct option.

title: Slow page loading
description: Customer experiences very slow loading on the dashboard page. Sometimes the page takes more than a minute to fully load.

title: Password reset not working
description: Customer states that they requested a password reset but did not receive any email even after checking spam folders.

title: Profile update error
description: Customer is unable to save profile changes. An error message appears every time they try to update their information.

title: Notification not sent
description: Customer reports that email notifications are not being delivered even though notification settings are enabled.

title: Search not working
description: Customer says the search feature returns no results even when searching for valid and existing data.

title: Data export failed
description: Customer attempted to export data as a CSV file, but the downloaded file appears corrupted and cannot be opened.

title: Account suspension issue
description: Customer claims their account was suspended unexpectedly despite following all platform rules and policies.
